title: SR 22-9 / CA 22-8: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 22-9 / CA 22-8 on ​FedEZFile™ and FedEZFile Fluent™ to be released for filing applications with the Federal Reserve
title_normalized: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 22-9 / CA 22-8 on ​FedEZFile™ and FedEZFile Fluent™ to be released for filing applications with the Federal Reserve

applicability_raw: This letter applies to all Federal Reserve-supervised institutions, including those with $10 billion or less in total consolidated assets.
